name: Pasticiotti with Pasta and Ricotta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the mini max pasta partially and drain.
2. Use 1-1/2 lbs ricotta in the pasta mixture.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients.
4. Pour over the mini max in a 9x13 pan.
5. Place the remaining ricotta over the mini max.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 325°F (Glass) or 350°F (Pan).
